description: Read-only SQL Server Analyst MCP — safe schema, stored procedure, and performance analysis.

lifecycle.reason: Missing required package metadata (runtimeHint or identifier)

name: io.github.coregentdevspace/sql-server-analyst-mcp

environmentVariables.description: SQL Server hostname or FQDN (e.g. <name>.database.windows.net for Azure SQL).
environmentVariables.name: MSSQL_SERVER

environmentVariables.description: TCP port (default 1433; set 0 for named instance with dynamic port).
environmentVariables.name: MSSQL_PORT

environmentVariables.description: Default database to connect to. Most tools also accept an override argument.
environmentVariables.name: MSSQL_DATABASE

environmentVariables.description: SQL authentication password. Quote values containing '#' in .env files.
environmentVariables.name: MSSQL_PASSWORD

environmentVariables.description: Encrypt the connection (true|false). Required true for Azure SQL.
environmentVariables.name: MSSQL_ENCRYPT

environmentVariables.description: Trust self-signed certificates (true|false). Use true only for local dev.
environmentVariables.name: MSSQL_TRUST_SERVER_CERT

environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated allowlist of databases the server may access. Empty = unrestricted.
environmentVariables.name: ALLOWED_DATABASES

environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated allowlist of schemas for schema tools. Empty = unrestricted.
environmentVariables.name: ALLOWED_SCHEMAS

environmentVariables.description: Default row limit per safe query (default 100).
environmentVariables.name: MAX_ROWS
